summary: Well-structured three-layer test suite (unit, workflow structure, integration) with good fixture design and clear organization. Covers most core requirements including classification logic, JSON/Markdown rendering, error handling, and workflow validation. Strengths: deterministic dates, end-to-end act testing, exact output assertions, clear test names. Minor gaps: --fail-on exit code behavior lacks explicit unit tests; some edge cases (policy_days=0, very large overdue values, data variations) could be more thoroughly exercised. Would reliably catch regressions in core functionality and workflow structure.
